lines.hearsay: The cutting at {place} was slower than the season wants.
lines.gossip: {A} came out to {place} for sedgewort and went back with half a bundle — {B} has not said why, and {A} has stopped asking, which between those two counts as a conversation.
lines.report: {A} recorded a short delivery of sedgewort from {B} at {place}, slot {slot}.
